title: Snipperly's Blossom Leaves
description: A leaf pack changing the cherry blossom leaves!
body:
This pack replaces the existing cherry leaves with this blossom texture I made.

Use Motschen's Better Leaves for example to achieve a bushy texture! Currently I have to fix my own bushy version still! ¯(。>︿<)_θ

![Pink Blossom tree with white flowers and flowery grass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/152cc8de3845eb4af4649af590f02249a4f94990_0.webp)

ENJOYY!! -Snips 🌱
